name: Mortgage Advisor Quality Review
description: Comprehensive quality assessment for mortgage advisor conversations covering financial accuracy, compliance, UX, and domain expertise.

fields.name: overall_quality
fields.label: Overall Quality
fields.description: Overall assessment of the conversation quality
fields.instructions: Consider all factors: accuracy, helpfulness, professionalism, and completeness.

fields.name: financial_accuracy
fields.label: Financial Accuracy
fields.description: Correctness of calculations and financial advice
fields.instructions: Check: monthly payment calculations, affordability assessments, DTI ratios, interest rates, down payment requirements.

fields.name: regulatory_compliant
fields.label: Regulatory Compliant
fields.description: Does the advice follow fair lending laws?
fields.instructions: Flag FALSE if discriminatory language, Fair Housing violations, or ECOA/TILA issues present.

fields.name: information_gathering
fields.label: Information Gathering
fields.description: Did the agent collect necessary information?
fields.instructions: Key info: income, debts, credit score, down payment, employment, property price.

fields.name: explanation_clarity
fields.label: Explanation Clarity
fields.instructions: Evaluate: plain language, jargon avoidance, logical flow, appropriate detail.

fields.name: topics_covered
fields.label: Important Topics Covered
fields.description: Which mortgage topics were meaningfully discussed?

fields.name: tone_professionalism
fields.label: Tone & Professionalism
fields.description: Was the tone appropriate and professional?
fields.instructions: Consider: empathy, patience, professionalism, appropriate formality.

fields.name: actionable_guidance
fields.label: Provided Actionable Guidance
fields.description: Did the agent provide clear next steps?
fields.instructions: Mark TRUE if agent gave specific, actionable advice.

fields.name: issues_notes
fields.label: Issues & Notes
fields.instructions: Document: calculation errors, compliance concerns, missed opportunities, highlights.

fields.name: estimated_satisfaction
fields.label: Estimated User Satisfaction (1-5)
fields.description: How satisfied would a real user be?
fields.instructions: 1=Very Unsatisfied, 5=Very Satisfied. Consider user's likely emotional state.
